content.full_text:
EWAGE                      New Alliance for Gay Equality / 1236 No Flores St., Suite 404 / Los Angeles, CA. 90069 / Tel. (213) 656-8803

ONORIARY CO-CHAIRPERSONS
H Denslow                                                                    November 30, 1977 IVED
v. Troy D. Perry      Fair Political Practices Comm.                        AND FILED
                      1100 K Street                                    In the office of the Secretary
EERING COMMITTEE     Sacramento, CA 95814                             of the State of California
                                                                       DEC - 3 1977
3 Chairpersons:
ub Demieon                                Re: NEW AGE, I.D. No 771368
d Crocker                                                            MARCH FONG EU Secretary of State
ecretary:
yre B. Riddell        Dear Sir:
eaasurer:
rold A. Krieger          This is to amend Form 410, Statement of Organization.
chers:
iane Abbott        Our new address is:
ileen Adams
                   8235 Santa Monica Blvd. Suite 207
rien Anderson      Los Angeles, CA 90046
H Denslow
ndy Eckberg        Our new treasurer is:
irren M. Leeh
arth Nelson        Jerold A. Krieger
ev. James Sandmire

THER BOARD MEMBERS    We would also like to know when we must file our
y Bottoni          campaign statement. We were opposing the qualification
anne Cordova       of Sen. Briggs' initiative concerning school personel.
obert H. Elenberg  As I told Mr. Greenwood on the telephone, there are
obbi Allan Froehling   problems because the petitions being circulated were
dy Freisewrt       invalidated and the initiative drive was stopped. We
ebecca Gould       therefore do not know what date starts the period for
enward Grant       our filing or if we only have to file an "off-year"
arol Hancock       statement. Please advise us as soon as possible or
olly Mandell       call the undersigned at (213) 467-4129 or at the
race Melton        office telephone at the top of this letter.
iverly Polakaff
nd Schreier
ustin Smith                                            Very truly yours,
anuel Whiteside
il Wilson
                                                       Jerold A. Krieger
rt A Zinn

embedding.qa_text: This is a letter from the New Alliance for Gay Equality to the Fair Political Practices Commission in Sacramento, CA. The letter is dated November 30, 1977, and is addressed to Mr. Troy D. Perry at the Fair Political Practices Commission. The letter states that the organization wishes to amend their Form 410, Statement of Organization. Their new address is 8235 Santa Monica Blvd., Suite 307, Los Angeles, CA 90046, and their new treasurer is Jerold A. Krieger. The letter also expresses concern about when they must file their campaign statement. The organization was opposing the qualification of Sen. Briggs' initiative concerning school personnel, but due to problems with petitions being circulated and the initiative drive being stopped, they do not know what date starts the period for filing or if they only have to file an "off-year" statement. The writer asks for advice as soon as possible or to call the undersigned at (213) 467-4129 or at the office telephone at the top of this letter. Very truly yours, Jerold A. Krieger
